core_payload.content:
# CapsuleOS Project

## 1. Definition and Essence
CapsuleOS Project is the umbrella execution program for the sovereign-knowledge operating system. It coordinates architecture law, validator hardening, branch governance, knowledge-production flow, agent runtime discipline, and cross-module integration under one accountable project lineage.

## 2. Core Scope
- `architecture_law` schema, protocol, integrity, and generation rules.
- `branch_governance` Real, Dream, quarantine, promotion, and audit discipline.
- `knowledge_production` the end-to-end contour linking quarry, refinery, review, and vault update.
- `agent_runtime` control plane, background daemons, assignment handling, and observability.
- `child_projects` Workspace, DeepMine, A2C, N-Infinity, and Symphony as coordinated execution streams.
- `release_discipline` milestones, risk posture, and platform-wide quality targets.

## 3. Lifecycle
The project progresses through planned platform evolution, implementation, validation, guarded promotion, and repeated architectural review so subsystem speed does not outrun platform coherence.

## 4. Integration
- **Foundation CapsuleOS:** doctrine and law surface implemented by this project.
- **Workspace / DeepMine / A2C / N-Infinity / Symphony Projects:** primary child delivery streams.
- **Security / Testing / Validation Gatekeeper:** guardrail contour for trusted evolution.
- **N1Hub Projects Index:** portfolio map that exposes platform lineage to the rest of the vault.

## 5. Philosophical Alignment
CapsuleOS Project applies To Dig Deep by turning foundational memory law into living engineering practice and by keeping the whole second-brain platform coherent while every child project evolves.

neuro_concentrate.summary: CapsuleOS Project is the portfolio root of the second-brain platform. It keeps validator law, branch governance, knowledge production, security, testing, and agent runtime discipline aligned while Workspace, DeepMine, A2C, Symphony, and N-Infinity evolve as semi-independent delivery streams. The hub matters because N1Hub is no longer only a set of ideas or UI surfaces; it is a platform whose doctrine has to survive real implementation pressure. CapsuleOS Project is therefore the place where platform law is translated into milestones, cross-module contracts, and sustained architectural coherence.
